about.title: About Us – STL Stone Gallery
about.paragraph1: STL Stone Gallery is a St. Louis, Missouri-based stone warehouse, offering high-quality marble, granite, and quartz products to both wholesale and retail customers across the United States.
about.paragraph2: Our story began long before we established operations in the U.S. As a long-standing marble quarry operator in Europe, we have extensive experience in extracting, processing, and exporting natural stone to international markets. Our blocks and slabs have been used in distinguished residential and commercial projects around the world, earning a strong reputation for quality, consistency, and trust.
about.paragraph3: With STL Stone Gallery, we are proud to bring this deep expertise and heritage directly to the American market. Our mission is to provide architects, designers, builders, and homeowners with exceptional stone products, reliable service, and seamless project support. From timeless marble collections to durable granites and contemporary quartz surfaces, our carefully curated selection is designed to elevate every space.
about.paragraph4: We are excited to be part of remarkable projects across the United States and look forward to building long-term partnerships founded on quality, transparency, and a genuine passion for premium natural stone.
about.whyChooseDesc: Built on a foundation of quality, expertise, and unwavering commitment to excellence
about.globalHeritageDesc: Decades of experience in marble extraction and processing from Europe
about.premiumQualityDesc: Every piece meets the highest standards of craftsmanship and beauty
about.expertServiceDesc: Dedicated support for designers, architects, and homeowners
about.passionDrivenDesc: A genuine love for premium stone in every project we undertake
about.startProjectDesc: Let's work together to bring your vision to life with our premium stone collection

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.reachOut: We're here to help bring your vision to life. Reach out to discuss your project or visit our showroom.
contact.visitShowroom: Visit our showroom in St. Louis, Missouri
contact.supportProject: Whether you're a designer, architect, builder, or homeowner, we're here to support your project from start to finish.
